calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Enforce Stipulation, Vacate Judgment And Dismiss Action;
Off Calendar Dec-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Matthew Hersh, CLI and Ora S. Prochovnick of New College Housing Advocacy Clinic, 241-1317, appearing for defendants and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Hersh presented the Court with a valid proof of service and DEFENDANTS ELIZABETH HANDLEY and BRIAN HANDLEY'S Motion To Enforce Stipulation, Vacate Judgment And Dismiss Action was granted. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: NICHOLE RODICH, CSR# 11604

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-01-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:STEVEN S ROSENTHAL FOR PLAINTIFF IRENE ROMERO-RHINE, ON PHONE STANDBY
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY ORA PROCHOVNICK FOR DEFENDANT ELIZABETH HANDLEY, PRESENT, AND BRIAN HANDLEY NOT PRESENT. BRIAN IS 18 YEARS OLD AND IN SCHOOL. ELIZABETH HAS AUTHORITY TO SETTLE.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT ELIZABETH AND BRIAN HANDLEY FOR RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 929 FULTON STREET. LEASE AGREEMENT FORFEITED. WRIT TO ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, HOWEVER PLAINTIFF WILL NOT EXECUTE UNTIL 7/15/05. DEFENDANT AGREES TO VACATE ON OR BEFORE 7/15/05. DEFENDANT RESERVES ALL CLAIMS REGARDING OCCUPANCY, BUT IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE TIMELY, RELEASES ALL CLAIMS PER 1542CC. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO VACATE TIMELY, PLAINTIFF ENTITLED TO FURTHER COSTS. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE NEUTRAL REFERENCE AND DEFENDANT TO PREPARE LETTER FOR PLAINITFF INDICATING THAT BRIAN IS NOT NAMED ON THE LEASE AND WAS A DEPENDENT OF ELIZABETH HANDLEY AND NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR RENT. DEFENDANT MAY VACATE ANYTIME PRIOR TO 7/15/05 AND PLAINTIFF IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR REPAIR OF PREMISES, EXCEPT THOSE REQUIRED BY LAW. ANY REMAINING PROPERY VALUED UNDER $100 DEEMED ABANDONED. AFTER FULL PERFORMANCE OF TERMS, UPON APPLICATION BY DEFENDANT, JUDGMENT TO BE SET ASIDE AND DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE FILED.

JUDGE PRO TEM:BARBARA ANSCHER ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;JOANN BRYCE (218)
